display.name: Flocking Bananas
display.author: prism
display.blurb: A literal joke for the developer community — what if Nano Banana drew bananas, and they flocked? Bright yellow curved shapes in formation, set to upbeat music.

annotation.technical_notes: An external image texture is replicated across the screen using domain repetition to create a dense field of sprites. The per-pixel warp shader applies a complex deformation field driven by the audio, while bass-gated zoom spikes trigger dramatic camera rushes. Feedback through sampler_main creates persistent trails of cascading elements during intense musical moments.
